agent_use_rules: Use this pack as a codepoint lookup route, not as evidence by itself.
Open the cited crosswalk row, HUST candidate packet, OBIMD/EVOBC staging rows, source register, and download log before collecting evidence.
Exact Unicode codepoint matches do not confirm oracle-character identity, readings, components, evolution chains, or decipherment conclusions.
Treat no OBIMD/EVOBC match as a current routing gap, not as negative evidence about character identity.
Keep any follow-up downloads or OCR work in ignored temporary directories until provenance, size, checksum, rights, and risk are recorded.
agent_use_rules_zh: 本包只作为 codepoint 反查路由使用，不能单独当作证据。
收集证据前，必须打开被引用的 crosswalk 行、HUST 候选包、OBIMD/EVOBC staging 行、来源登记和下载日志。
Unicode codepoint 精确命中不等于确认甲骨字身份、释读、构件、演化链或破译结论。
当前没有 OBIMD/EVOBC 命中只能视为路由缺口，不能当作身份判断的反证。
后续下载或 OCR 在记录来源、大小、checksum、权利和风险前必须留在已忽略临时目录。
purpose: Route AI Agents from HUST-OBC promotion candidates to OBIMD and EVOBC metadata rows that share the same dataset-label Unicode codepoint sequence. This pack is a lookup aid only and does not contain identity, reading, component, evolution-chain, or decipherment conclusions.
purpose_zh: 把 AI Agent 从 HUST-OBC 提升候选路由到具有相同数据集标签 Unicode codepoint 序列的 OBIMD 和 EVOBC metadata 行。本包只是反查入口，不包含身份、释读、构件、演化链或破译结论。

matched_evobc_by_codepoint.caution: Codepoint crosswalk candidate only. Exact dataset-label codepoint matches are lookup routes, not confirmed oracle-character identity, not accepted readings, not component assignments, not evolution-chain assignments, and not decipherment conclusions.

matched_obimd_and_evobc_by_codepoint.caution: Codepoint crosswalk candidate only. Exact dataset-label codepoint matches are lookup routes, not confirmed oracle-character identity, not accepted readings, not component assignments, not evolution-chain assignments, and not decipherment conclusions.

matched_obimd_by_codepoint.caution: Codepoint crosswalk candidate only. Exact dataset-label codepoint matches are lookup routes, not confirmed oracle-character identity, not accepted readings, not component assignments, not evolution-chain assignments, and not decipherment conclusions.

no_obimd_or_evobc_codepoint_match.caution: Codepoint crosswalk candidate only. Exact dataset-label codepoint matches are lookup routes, not confirmed oracle-character identity, not accepted readings, not component assignments, not evolution-chain assignments, and not decipherment conclusions.

source_routes.crosswalk_role_zh: HUST 候选标签和单字候选包入口
source_routes.provider: Huazhong University of Science and Technology research team / Scientific Data
source_routes.risk_note: Dataset is directly relevant to 1500+ deciphered and undeciphered characters, but raw images are large, non-commercially licensed and compiled from diverse sources including an unreliable GuoXueDaShi split.
source_routes.title: HUST-OBC: An open dataset for oracle bone character recognition and decipherment

source_routes.crosswalk_role_zh: OBIMD main-character staging 的 codepoint 反查入口
source_routes.provider: Key Laboratory of Oracle Bone Inscriptions Information Processing Anyang Normal University; Xiamen University; Tencent Youtu Lab; University of Cambridge; Scientific Data
source_routes.risk_note: Dataset card reports CC-BY 4.0 while the GitHub README includes narrower academic-use wording; raw files remain large and need rights review before import.
source_routes.title: OBIMD: Oracle Bone Inscriptions Multi-modal Dataset

source_routes.crosswalk_role_zh: EVOBC evolution category staging 的 codepoint 反查入口
source_routes.provider: Yuliang Liu research group / arXiv / Open-Oracle
source_routes.risk_note: Useful for evolution-chain experiments, but source texts/websites and image rights need separate review before corpus import.
source_routes.title: EVOBC: Evolution Oracle Bone Characters Dataset

status_routes.recommended_route: Open HUST packet, EVOBC category row, source register, and download log.
status_routes.recommended_route_zh: 打开 HUST 候选包、EVOBC category 行、来源登记和下载日志。

status_routes.recommended_route: Open HUST packet, OBIMD main-character row, EVOBC category row, source register, and download log.
status_routes.recommended_route_zh: 打开 HUST 候选包、OBIMD main-character 行、EVOBC category 行、来源登记和下载日志。

status_routes.recommended_route: Open HUST packet, OBIMD main-character row, source register, and download log.
status_routes.recommended_route_zh: 打开 HUST 候选包、OBIMD main-character 行、来源登记和下载日志。

status_routes.recommended_route: Open the HUST packet and treat missing current OBIMD/EVOBC matches as a routing gap only.
status_routes.recommended_route_zh: 打开 HUST 候选包；当前未命中 OBIMD/EVOBC 只能视为路由缺口。

title: HUST/OBIMD/EVOBC Codepoint Crosswalk Routing Context Pack
title_zh: HUST/OBIMD/EVOBC codepoint 交叉路由上下文包
